details.before:
@everyone Wave drop maps bot version 3 beta testing is out very early testing phase!


1. Added new badges to https://discord.com/channels/1041450125391835186/1475857473486327838 for power points you earn where you can earn up to 500 wave points with the top "God" badge
2. https://discord.com/channels/1041450125391835186/1508417577565687829  Wave economy system where you can exchange Wave Points (WP), Vbucks (VB), Loot Route Points (LRP), all together with eachother
- Bringing these new commands 

📈 Market Conversions
>pointstovbucks [amount] — Convert Wave Points to VBucks
>vbuckstopoints [amount] — Convert VBucks to Wave Points
>lrptowp [amount] — Convert Loot Routes to Wave Points
>wptolrp [amount] — Convert Wave Points to Loot Routes

💸 P2P Payments
>pay <user> <amount> — Send Wave Points directly to another user

🏦 Bank Bonds

>buybond <amount> — Lock away Wave Points for 14 days at 40% guaranteed return

>mybonds — Check the maturity status of your active bonds

🎰 Lottery
>buylottery <tickets> — Buy tickets for the weekly Wave Points lottery

📈 Interest Info
>bankinterestinfo — View your current interest rate and daily payout estimate

https://wavedropmaps.github.io/wave-leaderboard/economy.html Website to see all the live changes + more info
3.  Change https://discord.com/channels/1041450125391835186/1041583454820761610/1508323104391430175 

4.  Life time history activity inside wave 
>activitytimeline [user] - Full week-by-week history across all duties

5. How to ear
